titleStmt.title: SII 11.83: original edition by C. R. Krishnamacharlu, R. S. Panchamukhi, N. Lakshminaraya Rao and H. K. Narasimhaswami
No. 83. (B.K. No. 79 of 1929-30). BĀGĒVĀḌI, BAGEVADI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT. ON A SLAB STANDING NEAR THE WELL AT THE SĀRAṄGA-MAṬHA.

summary.p: The record refers itself to the reign of Traiḷōkyamalladēva (i.e. Sōmēśvara I) and registers a gift of land in the village Honnavāḍi in Tardavāḍi Thousand made by the senior queen Maiḷaladēvī in the presence of Billavarasa and others for repairs etc., to the temple of Sōmēśvara belonging to the sthāna of Jñānarāśi Vyākhyānadēva of the Pāśupata school. The gift was made into the hands of Chandeya-Bhaṭṭa on the occasion of laksha-hōma and was to be protected by the Five Hundred Mahājanas of Bāgavāḍi.

At the time of the grant, the king is stated to have been residing in the nelevīḍu at Vagghāpura in Karahaḍa-nāḍu after the conquest of the Pallavas. As the Pallavas of Kānchī had ceased to exist as a ruling power at this time, the Pallavas here referred to must be the Noḷaṁba-Pallavas. If so, we get for the first time in this record, the information of their being conquered by this Western Chāḷukya king. The record furnishes for Maiḷaladēvī a date four years earlier than that given by Dr. Fleet viz. A.D. 1053-54 (Bomb. Gaz. Vol. I, part II, p. 438).
The inscription is dated Śaka 971, Virōdhi, Bhādrapada, śu. puṇṇame, Tuesday, lunar eclipse which corresponds to A.D. 1049, August 15, Tuesday on which day there was a lunar eclipse.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti bhuvanāsraya śrīpṛdhvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēsvara
paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīma
ttraiḷōkyamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhi
pravarddhamānamācandrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire pallava
digvijeyaṁ geydu karahaḍanāḍoḷagaṇa vagghāpurada nelevīḍi
noḻsukhasaṁkatāvinōdadiṁ rājyageyyuttamire svastyanava
rataparamakalyāṇābhyudayasahasraphaḷabhōgabhāgini dvitī
yalakṣmi viḷāsavidyādhari dānacintāmaṇi savatimadabhaṁjane
samastānta ḻpuramukhamaṇḍani śrīmattraiḷōkyamalladēva viśā
ḷavakṣasthaḷanimāsiniyarappa śrīmatpiriyarasiya rmmaiḷala
dēvi svasti sakavarṣa 971 neya virōdhi saṁvatsarada bhādrapadada
puṇname bhaimavāra sōma grahaṇa parvvanimitta lakṣehōmado
ḷ śrībillavarasara saṁmukhadēsadoḷaṁ bhoṁthā dēvanayaṟa cidda
yya tiyoḷaṁ samastapradhānaraṁ pē®diṟdu tarddavāḍisāsiradoḷa
gaṇa muṁbāḍada baḷiya bhattagrāma hoṁnavāḍi yoḷe yamaniyamāsa
naprāṇāyāmapratyāhāradhyānadhāraṇājapasamādhisaṁpannarappa
pāsupatayōgācāryya rjñānarāsi vyākhyānadēvara sthānada sōmē
svaradēvara dēgulada khaṇḍasphuṭitanavakarmmada besakkaṁ dēvara bhōgakkaṁ
dhārāpūrvvakaṁ sarvvanamasyaṁ guḍe candeyabhaṭṭa rppaḍedu kuḍe
kētayyaṁ biṭṭa dōṇiya nela mattaru nālpattu rēvaṇayya
biṭṭa dōṇiya mattar pattu Antu dōṇiya nela mattar Ayvattu
Aṁkadoḷaṁ nela mattar 50 māṇiyabrahmapurige candeya bhaṭṭō
pādhyāyargge dhārāpūrvvakadiṁde bācimayya seṭṭiyara maga kā
ḷidāsayyaṁ biṭṭa dōṇiya nela mattar Ayvatu Aṁkadoḷaṁ nelaṁ
mattar 50 Antu mattar nūṟu Aṁkadoḷaṁ nela mattar 100 maṁ
svasti . vinutānēkavēdavēdāṅga tatvajñānamārttaṇḍajvāḷāmaṇḍita puṇḍarī
kākṣa brahmalakṣmīlakṣitaviśāḷavakṣa sthaḷarhaṁsayuvatisarā
jivirājamānarappa śrīmat bāgavāḍiya mahājana ma
ynūrvvaru mī dharmmamaṁ kaikoṇḍu pratipāḷisuvar .
sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasēturnṛpāṇāṁ kāḷē kāḷē pāḷanīyō ma
hadbhiḥ sarvvānētāṁ bhāginaḥ pārtthivēndrāṁ bhūyō bhūyō
yācatē rāmacandraḥ . sthānapatigoravanakkī sthāna
dabhikṣārtti ṁ paṭaṇasthānadoḷiralā
gaḷu kaḷeyallavē ḻduThe
Digital edition of SII 11.83 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
